phrases.intent_en: Ask where the lifeguard station is
phrases.text_local: Onde está localizado o Posto de Socorro 1?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-doo AW POHSH-too DIH soo-KOH-roo OOM?
phrases.cultural_note: Lifeguard posts are numbered sequentially along the shoreline and serve as primary orientation points.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica na zona central da praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH ZOH-nuh sayngt-RAHL DUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's located in the central zone of the beach.

responses.english: Good morning, it's located in the central zone of the beach.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH ZOH-nuh sayngt-RAHL DUH PREYEUH.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica na zona central da praia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ferry dock is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza o Cais da Ilha de Tavira?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-deh seh lo-kah-LEE-zah oo KAH-eesh dah EEL-yah jee-IL-yah tah-VEE-rah
phrases.cultural_note: Ferry terminals are the primary arrival hubs and are consistently marked with blue municipal signs.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fim da rua principal da ilha.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEEN DUH ROOUH preen-see-PAHL DUH EE-lyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the end of the island's main street.

responses.english: Good morning, at the end of the island's main street.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEEN DUH ROOUH preen-see-PAHL DUH EE-lyuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, fim da rua principal da ilha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ferry dock is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o cais do ferry?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEYESH DOO FEH-ree?
phrases.cultural_note: The ferry dock is the main access point to the island from Tavira.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no Cais da Ilha de Tavira.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO KEYESH DUH EE-lyuh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the Tavira Island Dock.

responses.english: Good morning, at the Tavira Island Dock.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO KEYESH DUH EE-lyuh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh.
responses.local: Bom dia, no Cais da Ilha de Tavira.

phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde fica a bilheteira do ferry?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO FEH-ree?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Cais da Ilha de Tavira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH DUH EE-lyuh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Tavira Island dock.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Tavira Island dock.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH DUH EE-lyuh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Cais da Ilha de Tavira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the beach kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Sabes onde fica o quiosque da praia?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese beach kiosks are commonly referenced relative to numbered lifeguard towers for quick navigation.

likely_response.local: Fica perto do posto de salvamento.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh PEHR-too DOO POHSH-too DIH sahl-vuh-MAYNG-too.

responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh PEHR-too DOO POHSH-too DIH sahl-vuh-MAYNG-too.
responses.local: Fica perto do posto de salvamento.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the beach kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Quiosque da Praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Beach service points are typically identified by proximity to the shoreline and seasonal banners.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Quiosque da Praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Where is the Beach Kiosk? Follow the signs to the Beach Kiosk.

responses.english: Where is the Beach Kiosk? Follow the signs to the Beach Kiosk.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Quiosque da Praia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the beach kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque da praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Praia da Ilha de Tavira is a barrier island beach; the kiosk is near the dune walkway.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Quiosque da Praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Beach Kiosk.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Beach Kiosk.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEEOHSH-kih DUH PREYEUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Quiosque da Praia.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Fortaleza de São João da Barra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH foo-ruh-tuh-LEH-zuh DIH SOWN ZHOOOWN DUH BAH-ruh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Fortaleza de São João da Barra.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH foo-ruh-tuh-LEH-zuh DIH SOWN ZHOOOWN DUH BAH-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Fortress of São João da Barra.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Fortress of São João da Barra.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH foo-ruh-tuh-LEH-zuh DIH SOWN ZHOOOWN DUH BAH-ruh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Fortaleza de São João da Barra.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Fortaleza de São João da Barra?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah ah for-tah-LEH-zah jee SAONG zha-OWNG dah BA-hah
phrases.cultural_note: Historic coastal forts often serve as fixed navigational landmarks for tourists and ferry routes.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, situa-se junto ao cais de embarque.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, see-TOOUH-SIH ZHOONNG-too OW KEYESH DIH aym-BAH-ruh-kih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's located next to the boarding dock.

responses.english: Good morning, it's located next to the boarding dock.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, see-TOOUH-SIH ZHOONNG-too OW KEYESH DIH aym-BAH-ruh-kih.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the lifeguard station is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Posto de Socorro 1?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POHSH-too DIH soo-KOH-roo OOM?
phrases.cultural_note: Lifeguard stations at Portuguese beaches are clearly marked with flags and signs, and 'Posto de Socorro' means first aid station.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Posto de Socorro 1.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHSH-too DIH soo-KOH-roo OOM.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to First Aid Station 1.

responses.english: Follow the signs to First Aid Station 1.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHSH-too DIH soo-KOH-roo OOM.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Posto de Socorro 1.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Passadiço das Dunas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW puh-suh-DEE-soo DUHSH DOO-nuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Wooden boardwalks protect fragile dune ecosystems and are clearly marked with municipal signage.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Passadiço das Dunas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-suh-DEE-soo DUHSH DOO-nuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Dunes Boardwalk.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Dunes Boardwalk.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-suh-DEE-soo DUHSH DOO-nuhsh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Passadiço das Dunas.

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POHSH-too DIH soo-KOH-roo?
